info.title: sKart APIs
info.description: API endpoints of sKart services documented on swagger.

tags.name: 1.1. Booking API International
tags.description: Endpoint to book international shipment

tags.name: 1.2. Booking API Domestic
tags.description: Endpoint to book domestic shipment

tags.name: 2.1. Rate Calculation API International
tags.description: Endpoint to calculate rate for international shipment

tags.name: 2.2. Rate Calculation API Domestic
tags.description: Endpoint to calculate rate for domestic shipment

tags.name: 3. Shipment Tracker API
tags.description: Endpoint to track shipment

tags.name: 4. Fetch Courier Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch courier details based on courier_id

tags.name: 5. Fetch Country Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch country details based on country_name

tags.name: 6. Fetch Currency Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch currency details

tags.name: 7. Fetch Organization Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch organization details

tags.name: 7.1. Fetch Organization Document Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch organization document details.

tags.name: 8. Credit Limit Check API
tags.description: Endpoint to check credit limit

tags.name: 9. Fetch Consigner Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch consigner details

tags.name: 10. Fetch Consignee Details API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch consignee details

tags.name: 11. FLM API
tags.description: Endpoint to check flm service enabled or not

tags.name: 12. GST Slabs API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch gst-slabs information

tags.name: 13. Zipcode Existence Check API
tags.description: Endpoint to check zipcode existence in our system.

tags.name: 14. KYC Upload API
tags.description: Endpoint to upload documents for KYC.

tags.name: 15. Fetch all MSME API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch all MSMEs.

tags.name: 16. Fetch single MSME API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch single MSME.

tags.name: 17. Check Pickup Availability API
tags.description: Endpoint to fetch pickup availabilty information. 👉**(Note: This API is for *Fedex Import* only)**

tags.name: 18. Create Pickup API
tags.description: Endpoint to create pickup. 👉**(Note: This API is for *Fedex Import* and *Aramex - Import* only)**

tags.name: 19. Cancel Pickup API
tags.description: Endpoint to cancel a pickup. 👉**(Note: This API is for *Fedex Import* only)**

booking_type.description: booking_type can be a number or integer string. Allowed values are either of: 1, 2.

get.description: This API fetches GST slab details.

post.description: This API can be used to check whether a zipcode exists in our record or not.

user_name.description: It is the username of the user

country_id.description: country_id must be a number or numeric string.

post.description: This API can be used to upload the document for KYC which will be used in booking.

user_name.description: It is the username of the user

organization_id.description: for ***Individual***, **organization_id: 1**, i.e. **1** is the **id** for ***Individual***. Refer the API: **7. Fetch Organization Details API**

document_1_id.description: for ***PAN card***, **document_1_id: 2**, i.e. **2** is the **id** for ***PAN card.***. Refer the API: **7.1. Fetch Organization Document Details API**

document_1.description: This file is expected to be an image of ***PAN card*** because we are passing **document_1_id: 2**

document_2_id.description: for ***Aadhar card***, **document_2_id: 7**, i.e. **7** is the **id** for ***Aadhar card***. Refer the API: **7.1. Fetch Organization Document Details API**

document_2.description: This file is expected to be an image of ***Aadhar card*** because we are passing **document_2_id: 7**

post.description: *This API fetches the list of all MSMEs associated with a franchisee.*

user_name.description: It is the username of the user.

offset.description: offset * limit = count of records to be skipped. for eg: if you pass offset: 2 and limit: 20 then it means that **40** records will be skipped in the fetched data.

limit.description: It is the number of records to be fetched during a single API hit. **Default is: 10**

search_key.description: Pass the part of the mobile number based on which you want to search.

get.description: This API fetches the details of a single MSME associated with a franchisee based on **msme_id**.

parameters.name: msme_id
parameters.description: Id of the MSME. You can get it from the API: **15. Fetch all MSME API**. Pick the value of msme_id.

post.description: *This API fetches the details regarding pickup availability.*

user_name.description: It is the username of the user.

awb.description: It is a unique string associated to each booking placed.

post.description: *This API creates a pickup for a pre-placed import booking.*

user_name.description: It is the username of the user.

awb.description: It is a unique string associated to each booking placed.

post.description: *This API cancels a pickup for a pre-placed import booking.*

user_name.description: It is the username of the user.

awb.description: It is a unique string associated to each booking placed.

booking_type.description: Required. Must be 1 or 2. 1 -> international, 2 -> domestic.

destination_country.description: Required if booking_type=1. Must be a string. Please refer the API ****5. Fetch Country Details API**** to find the genuine country name. *** Leave the country_name field to be empty if you want to fetch all country names.

shipment_type.description: Required. Must be 1, 2, or 4. 1 for non-doc, 2 for doc, 4 for commercial

weight.description: Required. Must be a number. Weight in kilograms.

quantity.description: Value of quantity will be effective if and only if shipment_type is 1 or 4. Must be an integer or numeric string. It represents number of pieces.

length.description: Value of length will be effective if and only if shipment_type is 1 or 4. Must be an integer or numeric string. It represents max length in centimeters.

booking_type.description: Required. Must be 1 or 2. 1 -> international, 2 -> domestic.

shipment_type.description: Required. Must be 1, 2, or 4. 1 for non-doc, 2 for doc, 4 for commercial

weight.description: Required. Must be a number. Weight in kilograms.

quantity.description: Value of quantity will be effective if and only if shipment_type is 1 or 4. Must be an integer or numeric string. It represents number of pieces.

length.description: Value of length will be effective if and only if shipment_type is 1 or 4. Must be an integer or numeric string. It represents max length in centimeters.

get.description: Used to get courier vendor data
Used to get all currency details
This API fetches organization document details

booking_type.description: booking_type can be a number or integer string. Allowed values are either of: 1, 2.

shipment_type.description: shipment_type can be a number or numeric string. Allowed values are either of: 1, 2, 4.

weight.description: weight can be a number or numeric string. weight must exist when shipment_type: 2, i.e. doc

description.description: description must exist when shipment_type: 2, i.e. doc.

unit.description: **unit must exist when shipment_type: 2, i.e. doc.**

courier_id.description: It is the unique identifier for the courier
